title: Memory Usage Screen
body:
Memory Usage Screen

Shows a memory bar during loading, like the 1.12 Forge startup screen.  
↓(Not implemented in Forge version because mixin is not available yet)  
Setup Screen

![Start Up](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/376/778/2021-07-03_01h07_00.png)  
Loading Screen
![Start Up](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/376/779/2021-07-03_01h06_29.png)  
In addition, it is possible to display with the set key.
![Memory Bar](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/382/689/2021-07-25_03.png)
